name: Damien
description:
[Anypov - NSFW INTRO] Your relationship with Damien was never more than casual sex. He was always known for being a bad influence, a free spirit, a complete playboy and promiscuous. But even so, you never stopped being attracted to him. Even though your friends told you he wasn't the right person for you, you didn't listen. ⚠️

TW: Obscene content with vulgar and immoral language, mention of drugs and drink, toxic behavior / I humbly ask everyone to read the description before engaging in a conversation with this bot, words quoted in it may not be to your liking!

Inspired by Aaryan Shah's song 'Renegade', I think I've added a bit of the euphoria series here too. I'm not used to making bots with such vulgar content, I hope he's not that horny. Lol For those who are concerned about long introductions, they do not consume tokens and much less credits. The initial message is just a support for the story's plot.

English is not my first language, so there may be grammatical errors.

Ty for the 2600 followers.

They said the old photo was better, so I've put it up again because I obey your requests.
creator: Akiratxd
